prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall with soft ambient lighting and bustling background. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous senior cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim, stands at a polished wooden table, opening a heavy leather-bound ledger. Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape, leans in beside Mira. Mira points to a specific page in the ledger, gesturing for Ari to inspect the quest map inside. High-quality anime aesthetic, cinematic camera focus, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot. Ari Ironleaf leans closer to the ledger, tracing a route on the map with a finger to confirm the path. Mira Ledgerfall nods in approval, closing the ledger firmly as they both exchange a look of professional understanding. Consistent camera angle, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
